name: systemfehler
description: Modular, extensible, preservation-oriented data platform for social services in Germany

scripts.crawl:all: python crawlers/cli.py crawl benefits --source arbeitsagentur && python crawlers/cli.py crawl aid --source seeded && python crawlers/cli.py crawl tools --source seeded && python crawlers/cli.py crawl organizations --source seeded && python crawlers/cli.py crawl contacts --source seeded
scripts.expand:links:all: python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain benefits && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain aid && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain tools && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain organizations && python crawlers/cli.py expand-links --domain contacts
scripts.dev:all:legacy: cross-env API_PORT=3001 AI_PORT=8002 DATABASE_URL=postgresql://systemfehler:dev_password@127.0.0.1:5432/systemfehler concurrently -k -n api,frontend,ai,ollama,docker -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run api" "npm run dev" "npm run ai:api:ollama" "npm run ollama:dev" "docker-compose up"
scripts.ai:api:ollama: cross-env AI_PORT=8002 AI_PROVIDER=ollama AI_DEFAULT_MODEL=qwen2.5:3b AI_MODEL_REWRITE=qwen2.5:3b AI_MODEL_SYNTHESIZE=qwen2.5:3b AI_MODEL_ENRICH=qwen2.5:3b uvicorn backend.ai_service.gateway:app --reload --port %AI_PORT%
scripts.test:backend: npm run test:backend:js && npm run test:backend:py
scripts.prepare:dist-pages: npm run build:life-event-packs && cd frontend && cross-env VITE_API_URL=/api VITE_AI_API_URL=/api/ai npm run build && cd .. && powershell -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; if (Test-Path 'dist-pages') { Remove-Item 'dist-pages' -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'dist-pages' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'frontend/dist/*' -Destination 'dist-pages' -Recurse -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'dist-pages\data\_topics' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'data/_topics/life_events.json' -Destination 'dist-pages\data\_topics\life_events.json' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'data/_topics/life_event_resource_packs.json' -Destination 'dist-pages\data\_topics\life_event_resource_packs.json' -Force"
scripts.dev:pages:d1:reset: npx wrangler d1 execute systemfehler-db --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS entries; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS moderation_queue; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benefits; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS aid; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tools; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS organizations; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS contacts; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit_log;" --config cloudflare-pages/wrangler.toml && npx wrangler d1 execute systemfehler-db --local --file=cloudflare-pages/d1/schema.sql --config cloudflare-pages/wrangler.toml && python scripts/seed_local_d1_chunked.py --database systemfehler-db --seed cloudflare-pages/d1/seed_entries.generated.sql --wrangler-cwd cloudflare-pages && npx wrangler d1 execute systemfehler-db --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS entries; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS moderation_queue; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benefits; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS aid; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tools; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS organizations; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS contacts; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit_log;" --config wrangler.toml && npx wrangler d1 execute systemfehler-db --local --file=cloudflare-pages/d1/schema.sql --config wrangler.toml && python scripts/seed_local_d1_chunked.py --database systemfehler-db --seed cloudflare-pages/d1/seed_entries.generated.sql --wrangler-cwd .
scripts.dev:all:pages: npm run dev:pages:stop && npm run prepare:dist-pages && npm run dev:pages:d1:reset && npx wrangler pages dev ../dist-pages --port=8788 --live-reload --cwd cloudflare-pages
scripts.dev:all:pages:ai: npm run dev:pages:stop && npm run prepare:dist-pages && npm run dev:pages:d1:reset && npx wrangler pages dev ../dist-pages --port=8788 --live-reload --ai AI --cwd cloudflare-pages
scripts.dev:all:pages:fast: npm run dev:pages:stop && npm run prepare:dist-pages && npx wrangler pages dev ../dist-pages --port=8788 --live-reload --cwd cloudflare-pages
scripts.dev:all:pages:fast:ai: npm run dev:pages:stop && npm run prepare:dist-pages && npx wrangler pages dev ../dist-pages --port=8788 --live-reload --ai AI --cwd cloudflare-pages
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run prepare:dist-pages && npx wrangler pages deploy ../dist-pages --project-name=systemfehler --branch=main --cwd=cloudflare-pages
scripts.deploy:all: python crawlers/cli.py crawl benefits --source arbeitsagentur && python crawlers/cli.py validate --domain benefits && python crawlers/cli.py import --domain benefits --to-db && wrangler d1 execute systemfehler-db --remote --file=cloudflare-pages/d1/schema.sql && python scripts/ingest_all_to_d1.py && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml && wrangler pages deploy

_todo: TODO: Add dependencies as needed (e.g., ajv for JSON schema validation)
